statement: In every magma, Equation 1007 (`x = y * ((z * w) * (z * w))`) implies Equation 3294 (`x * x = y * (z * (y * z))`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0521
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op (op z w) (op z w)))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, (op x x) = (op y (op z (op y z)))
